title: pinguicula vulgaris subsp. reichenbachiana
intro: Pinguicula vulgaris subsp. reichenbachiana, also known as the butterwort or common butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species that belongs to the family Lentibulariaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Pinguicula vulgaris subsp. reichenbachiana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from the leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams for various health applications.
